texto: Lucky enough, through the public school system, I had been able to have some music education, and that gave me something to focus on, and discipline - like a family to feel part of. There was a healthy family.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Flea: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a educacao. texto: About 13-14 years ago, I went back to my alma mater, Fairfax High School, and ran into the music teacher. She invited me to come speak to the kids about the viability of a music career. When I went into the room where I used to play every day in a big orchestra, they had nothing!

texto: All I knew about Ethiopia was from a few records that I like, as well as what I read about the famine. But you get there and it's another world. It's filled with art and music and poetry and intellectuals and writers - all kinds of people.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Flea: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. texto: A big part of my life is music education because it changed my life - but arts, academics and athletics should all be equally treated in the school.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Flea sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida.
